case_title: BROWN AUDIO VISUAL SERVICES, LLC VS. AURICE GUYTON EVENTS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN AUDIO VISUAL SERVICES, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 DUE TO THE UNAVAILIBILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR THIS MATTER. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,268.35 FILED BY BROWN AUDIO VISUAL SERVICES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AURICE GUYTON EVENTS SF AFRICAN AMERICA CHAMBER OF COMMERCE FOUNDATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-02-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BROWN AUDIO VISUAL SERVICES, LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AURICE GUYTON EVENTS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AFRICAN AMERICAN CHAMBER OF COMMERCE FOUNDATION IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR AURICE GUYTON EVENTS IS ON FILE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANT AFRICAN AMERICAN CHAMBER OF COMMERCE FOUNDATION. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE CASE ON THE UNSERVED DEFENDANT, AFRICAN AMERICAN CHAMBER OF COMMERCE FOUNDATION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO ADD TWO DEFENDANTS. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $310) SERVED JAN-28-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AURICE GUYTON EVENTS
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM
